content.text: I'll create all 10 files now. Since these are all new files with no dependencies between them, I'll create them all in parallel.

input.content:
export const theme = {
  colors: {
    primary: '#6366f1',
    primaryDark: '#4f46e5',
    primaryLight: '#818cf8',
    secondary: '#f59e0b',
    background: '#f8fafc',
    surface: '#ffffff',
    text: '#1e293b',
    textMuted: '#64748b',
    textLight: '#94a3b8',
    success: '#22c55e',
    error: '#ef4444',
    warning: '#f59e0b',
    info: '#3b82f6',
    border: '#e2e8f0',
  },
  spacing: { xs: 4, sm: 8, md: 16, lg: 24, xl: 32, xxl: 48 },
  borderRadius: { sm: 8, md: 12, lg: 16, xl: 24, full: 999 },
  fontSize: { xs: 12, sm: 14, md: 16, lg: 18, xl: 24, xxl: 32, xxxl: 40 },
  shadow: {
    sm: { shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 1 }, shadowOpacity: 0.05, shadowRadius: 2, elevation: 1 },
    md: { shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 2 }, shadowOpacity: 0.1, shadowRadius: 4, elevation: 3 },
    lg: { shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 4 }, shadowOpacity: 0.15, shadowRadius: 8, elevation: 5 },
  },
};

data.command: FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""); CONTENT=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.content // ""); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q 'console\.log'; then echo 'Warning: console.log statements should be removed before committing' >&2; exit 2; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" == "package.json" ]]; then echo 'Checking for vulnerable dependencies...'; npm audit --audit-level=moderate; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then RESULT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "TypeScript errors found: $RESULT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && grep -q 'import \* from' "$FILE"; then echo 'Warning: Avoid wildcard imports for better tree-shaking' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ && "$FILE" != *".test."* && "$FILE" != *".spec."* ]]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" | sed -E 's/\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$//'); for TEST_FILE in "$DIR/$BASENAME.test."* "$DIR/$BASENAME.spec."*; do if [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then echo "Running tests for $TEST_FILE..."; if command -v jest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx jest "$TEST_FILE" --passWithNoTests; elif command -v vitest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx vitest run "$TEST_FILE"; fi; break; fi; done; fi
callback

content.text:
All 10 files have been created successfully. Here is a summary of what was written:

| # | File | Path |
|---|------|------|
| 1 | Theme | `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\theme\index.ts` |
| 2 | Supabase client | `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\lib\supabase.ts` |
| 3 | OneSignal lib | `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\lib\onesignal.ts` |
| 4 | Deep linking | `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\lib\deep-linking.ts` |
| 5 | Cache lib | `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\lib\cache.ts` |
| 6 | AuthContext | `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\contexts\AuthContext.tsx` |
| 7 | PushContext | `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\contexts\PushContext.tsx` |
| 8 | useCachedQuery hook | `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\hooks\useCachedQuery.ts` |
| 9 | useQRScanner hook | `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\hooks\useQRScanner.ts` |
| 10 | useBrightness hook | `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\hooks\useBrightness.ts` |

The directory structure created under `apps/mobile/src/` is:

```
src/
├── theme/
│   └── index.ts
├── lib/
│   ├── supabase.ts
│   ├── onesignal.ts
│   ├── deep-linking.ts
│   └── cache.ts
├── contexts/
│   ├── AuthContext.tsx
│   └── PushContext.tsx
└── hooks/
    ├── useCachedQuery.ts
    ├── useQRScanner.ts
    └── useBrightness.ts
```

All files were written with the exact content specified -- theme configuration, Supabase client with SecureStore adapter, OneSignal push notification integration, deep linking handler with QR URL parser, AsyncStorage-based cache with TTL, authentication context with Supabase auth, push notification context with player registration, and three custom hooks (cached query, QR scanner with haptics, and brightness control).

Etape suivante ?
